market_pulse: Encore Beach Club leading with Calvin Harris & Diplo this weekend; LIV capturing EDC momentum with major talent; OMNIA & Hakkasan ramping up Memorial Day programming.

weekend_readiness.label: PEAK
factors: Major DJ lineups across all venues
weekend_readiness.liv_recommendation: Maximize weekend content—Stories around pool activities, VIP experiences, and talent countdowns. LIV has strong talent roster (Tiësto, David Guetta); lean into exclusive access narratives.

content_gaps.description: Competitors (XS, Hakkasan, OMNIA) showing more VIP lounge access and artist prep content; LIV has minimal BTS from talent.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create exclusive BTS reels with current and upcoming talent—soundchecks, green room moments, pre-show preps.

content_gaps.description: Encore Beach Club & OMNIA running more creator-partner content; LIV presence minimal on micro-influencer amplification.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Partner with 10-20 Vegas micro-influencers (5K-50K followers) for Memorial Day weekend Stories; tag @livlasvegas in UGC.

content_gaps.description: Competitors using trending sounds in clips; LIV posts leaning more promotional vs. trend-forward.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Audit top 5 trending Vegas/nightlife audio on TT this week; repurpose 2-3 clips weekly with trending sounds.
